{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":16683,"duration_api_ms":16061,"ttft_ms":2355,"ttft_stream_ms":1271,"time_to_request_ms":47,"num_turns":4,"result":"This repo (a Linux kernel tree) has three pluggable block-layer (blk-mq) I/O schedulers under `block/`:

1. **mq-deadline** (`block/mq-deadline.c`) — enforces per-request read/write expiration deadlines (soft limits, default 500ms reads / 5s writes) so no request starves indefinitely, while still batching sequential requests for throughput. Dispatch entry point: `dd_dispatch_request()` at `block/mq-deadline.c:452` (delegates to `__dd_dispatch_request()` at `block/mq-deadline.c:325`).

2. **kyber** (`block/kyber-iosched.c`) — controls tail latency by dynamically throttling per-domain (read/write/discard/other) in-flight queue depths to hit target latencies, rather than using explicit deadlines. Dispatch entry point: `kyber_dispatch_request()` at `block/kyber-iosched.c:789`.

3. **BFQ** (`block/bfq-iosched.c`) — a proportional-share scheduler (Budget Fair Queueing, B-WF2Q+) that assigns sector-based budgets to per-process queues by weight, with extra privileging of interactive/soft-real-time queues for low latency. Dispatch entry point: `bfq_dispatch_request()` at `block/bfq-iosched.c:5298` (delegates to `__bfq_dispatch_request()` at `block/bfq-iosched.c:5157`).

Each is registered as an `elevator_type` with its function wired to the `.ops.dispatch_request` field (`mq-deadline.c:994`, `kyber-iosched.c:1008`, `bfq-iosched.c:7597`), which `blk_mq_run_hw_queue()` → `__blk_mq_sched_dispatch_requests()` calls into.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"e138fb03-4e22-48cc-853b-afa5bb0d2a70","total_cost_usd":0.22886279999999998,"usage":{"input_tokens":8,"cache_creation_input_tokens":25928,"cache_read_input_tokens":182986,"output_tokens":1225,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":25928,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":620,"cache_read_input_tokens":52464,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2427,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2427},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-5":{"inputTokens":8,"outputTokens":1225,"cacheReadInputTokens":182986,"cacheCreationInputTokens":25928,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.22886279999999998,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"bbea6ac8-4726-4d5e-9762-bdfdfc45ec9e"}
